title: elaeocarpus ngii subsp. ngii
intro: Elaeocarpus ngii subsp. ngii, also known as the Ngi tree, is a plant species native to the island of Borneo. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus ngii subsp. ngii include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential in lowering blood sugar levels and cholesterol. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and topical applications.
